description: Two-column layout with a fixed-width sidebar and a fluid main area. The first child is the sidebar, the second is the main content. Automatically stacks vertically on narrow screens.

data-sidebar.agent_hint: Activates the sidebar layout. Bare attribute, no value needed.

data-sidebar-width.agent_hint: Controls sidebar width: sm=160px, md=256px, lg=352px.

data-sidebar-side.agent_hint: Which side the sidebar appears on. Default is left.

sidebar.agent_hint: First child — the fixed-width sidebar. Use aside or nav.

content.agent_hint: Second child — the fluid main content area. Use main or section.

do: Use aside or nav as the first child (sidebar)
Use main or section as the second child (content)
Use data-sidebar-side=right to flip the sidebar to the right
Use data-sidebar-width to control sidebar width
dont: Do not use more than 2 direct children
Do not use div as the sidebar or content — prefer semantic elements
Do not set widths via inline styles
